description_long: This is a modern sniper rifle featuring a long, matte-black barrel and a robust, tactical chassis. The rifle is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision long-range targeting. It has a fixed stock with an ergonomic pistol grip and an adjustable cheek rest, providing stability and comfort for the shooter. The rifle includes a bipod attached near the front for steady aiming when prone or on surfaces. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a rugged and professional appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, large scope, fixed stock, and bipod, finished in matte black with metallic and polymer elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's end, bipod legs, and the scope's front lens.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, scope, bipod, stock, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rifle's profile, including the scope, bipod, stock, and magazine.
